events.title: Primary Election Polling Place
events.description: Special Programs Primary Election Polling Place The Hammer is an official Vote Center for the California Primary Election, including primaries for the state’s governor, US Senate, and other races. Tue Jun 2 7:00 AM

events.title: Lunchtime Art Talk on Patricia Domínguez-Claro
events.description: Tours & Talks Lunchtime Art Talk on Patricia Domínguez-Claro Curatorial assistant Jessi DiTillio leads an in-person discussion of Patricia Domínguez-Claro's work. Wed Jun 3 12:30 PM

events.title: The Sea Around Us
events.description: Screenings The Sea Around Us This immersive cinematic experience created by artist Rebeca Méndez journeys into the California depths to confront a half-century of chemical dumping off the coast of Catalina Island. Followed by a conversation with UCLA English Professor Elizabeth DeLoughrey and investigative journalist Rosanna Xia. Wed Jun 3 7:30 PM

events.title: Mindful Awareness Meditation
events.description: Special Programs Mindful Awareness Meditation Free weekly drop-in sessions are open to all who are interested in learning how to live more presently. Thu Jun 4 12:30 PM

events.title: Mortician
events.description: Screenings UCLA Film & TV Archive Mortician Writer-director Abdolreza Kahani’s slow-burn thriller follows a schlubby émigré who performs Islamic ritual washing of the dead as a cultural service of the Iranian government, who is recruited by an enigmatic, exiled pop star to help her with a public protest. Fri Jun 5 7:30 PM

events.description: Screenings UCLA Film & TV Archive Inside Amir / Divine Comedy Screening of two new films from Iran, as part of the 2026 UCLA Celebration of Iranian Cinema. Sat Jun 6 7:30 PM

events.title: 826LA@Hammer: Worldbuilders: Adventure Architects
events.description: Kids 826LA@Hammer: Worldbuilders: Adventure Architects Using Collective Journey Storytelling, students will learn how to plan a story where instead of just one hero doing everything, a whole group works together to make change. Led by experiential designer Justin Stucey. Sun Jun 7 11:00 AM

events.title: All Space Considered – June 2026
events.description: Griffith Observatory broadcasts this public program live on the third Thursday of every month. Join the Observatory's curatorial staff as they examine and explain the most-talked-about subjects in astronomy and space science. This month's program is ONLINE only.
